category_sources: Official homepage https://www.hatari-emu.org/ describes Hatari as an Atari emulator and open source software.
source_facts.description says Hatari is an Atari ST/STE/TT/Falcon emulator.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title/logo and docs use the name Hatari.
docs_sources: Official homepage navigation links to https://www.hatari-emu.org/docs.html as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://framagit.org/hatari/releases; per instruction repo returned as null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists supported Atari systems and bundled utilities; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools.
